message:
fix(scheduler): prevent lost wakeups in three_lane backoff loop (bd-2t4n)

- Check both global AND local queues before parking (was only checking global)
- After park(), reset backoff and continue loop to re-check (was breaking)
- Add wake_state deduplication to prevent duplicate scheduling
- Add fairness limit (16 consecutive cancel executions) to prevent starvation
- Include comprehensive tests for deduplication and wakeup behavior

Closes: bd-2t4n
Relates-to: bd-e71n (Scheduler Lost Wakeup epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
